nodes.name: draft-review-checklist.md
nodes.summary: Quality checklist for reviewing draft agent configurations before submission, covering identity, role clarity, workflow, governance fields, safety, and done criteria across 12 structured sections.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Step-by-step skill guide for creating a new Paperclip agent, covering identity confirmation, adapter discovery, instruction source selection, icon discovery, drafting a hire config, quality review, and governance state handling.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive guide for creating and developing a Paperclip plugin outside of core, covering CLI scaffold workflow, local install and rebuild loop, sanity checks, verification, and documentation expectations.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Developer operations guide for Paperclip contributors covering git workflows, worktrees, fork management, pull request creation process, persistent dev server setup with tmux, and common mistakes to avoid.

nodes.name: api-reference.md
nodes.summary: Exhaustive Paperclip API reference covering response schemas, worked examples for IC/manager/reviewer heartbeats, comments, cross-team delegation, governance and approvals, issue lifecycle, error handling, and a full endpoint listing across 37 sections.

nodes.name: company-skills.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for managing company-level skills in Paperclip, covering the permission model, core endpoints, install workflows via skills.sh or GitHub, inspecting installed skills, and assigning skills to agents.

nodes.name: issue-workspaces.md
nodes.summary: Reference for issue workspace runtime controls in Paperclip, covering how to discover a workspace, control services, read workspace URLs, and available MCP tools.

nodes.name: routines.md
nodes.summary: Detailed reference for Paperclip routines covering lifecycle, creation, concurrency and catch-up policies, trigger types (cron, webhook, API), manual runs, updating, and reading routines and runs.

nodes.name: workflows.md
nodes.summary: Workflow playbooks for common Paperclip operations including project setup, OpenClaw invite flow, setting agent instructions path, company import/export, and a self-test playbook.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Primary Paperclip skill file describing authentication, the heartbeat procedure, issue dependencies, board approval requests, niche workflows, routines, workspace controls, critical rules, comment style, planning requirements, and key API endpoints across 16 sections.

nodes.name: schemas.md
nodes.summary: Defines the atomic fact schema for items.yaml used in PARA memory files and describes the memory decay mechanism for staleness management.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for the PARA memory file system defining three memory layers (knowledge graph PARA structure, daily notes, and tacit knowledge), recall procedures using qmd, and planning integration.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for the terminal bench loop procedure used to iteratively run smoke tests, diagnose failures, request board confirmation before fixes, and safely close iterations via QA and CTO review steps.

nodes.name: playwright-multiuser-authenticated.config.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright configuration for multi-user authenticated end-to-end tests, likely specifying authentication state storage and parallel test execution settings.

nodes.name: playwright-multiuser.config.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright configuration for multi-user end-to-end tests without pre-authenticated state, defining test project setup for concurrent multi-user scenarios.

nodes.name: playwright.config.ts
nodes.summary: Primary Playwright configuration for end-to-end tests defining base URL, test directories, browser targets, timeouts, and reporter settings for the e2e test suite.

nodes.name: playwright.config.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright configuration for release smoke tests, providing a lightweight test configuration targeted at verifying a released build meets baseline functionality.

nodes.name: tsconfig.base.json
nodes.summary: Base TypeScript compiler configuration shared across all packages in the monorepo, defining common compiler options that sub-packages extend.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: Root TypeScript project references configuration extending the base config, wiring together all monorepo package sub-projects for composite builds.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses TypeScript project references for monorepo composite builds.

nodes.name: components.json
nodes.summary: shadcn/ui component library configuration for the UI package, specifying style, RSC mode, Tailwind settings, path aliases, and icon library selection.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: HTML entry point for the Vite-powered React UI application, setting up meta tags, PWA manifest link, service worker registration reference, and the root mount point for the React app.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for the @paperclipai/ui frontend package defining build scripts (Vite), Storybook, testing, TypeScript dependencies, and publish configuration.

nodes.name: site.webmanifest
nodes.summary: PWA web app manifest defining the application name, icons, theme colors, display mode, and start URL for the Paperclip UI progressive web application.

nodes.name: sw.js
nodes.summary: Service worker script implementing a cache-first strategy for PWA offline support, handling install, activate, and fetch events to cache and serve static assets.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Brief overview of the @paperclipai/ui package describing what gets published, how to use Storybook for component development, and typical usage patterns.
